transitions.condition: (doc.bom_or_cad in ['New BOM'] and doc.est_delivery_date and doc.design_type != 'As Per Serial No') or (doc.order_type == 'Purchase')
doc.bom_or_cad in ['CAD','Duplicate BOM'] and doc.designer_assignment and frappe.db.get_value("Designer Assignment - CAD",{"parent":doc.name},"designer", order_by="designer asc")
doc.design_type == 'As Per Serial No' and doc.bom_or_cad == 'New BOM'
doc.new_bom and doc.mod_reason != 'Change in Metal Touch'

states.state: Design Rework in Progress - On Hold

transitions.condition: doc.rough_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Rough Sketch Approval",{"parent":doc.name}, "approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc")
doc.rough_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Rough Sketch Approval",{"parent":doc.name}, "approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc")

doc.final_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval HOD",{"parent":doc.name},"approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc") and (doc.custom_sketch_workflow_state == 'Internal' or doc.custom_sketch_order_customer_approval_flow == 0)

doc.final_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval HOD",{"parent":doc.name},"approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc") and doc.custom_sketch_workflow_state == 'External' and doc.custom_sketch_order_customer_approval_flow == 1
doc.final_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval HOD",{"parent":doc.name},"approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc") and doc.custom_sketch_workflow_state == 'Internal'

doc.final_sketch_approval and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval HOD",{"parent":doc.name},"approved as cnt", order_by="cnt asc") and doc.custom_sketch_workflow_state == 'External' and doc.custom_sketch_order_customer_approval_flow == 1

doc.final_sketch_approval_cmo and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval CMO",{"parent":doc.name},"sub_category") and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval CMO",{"parent":doc.name},"category") and frappe.db.get_value("Final Sketch Approval CMO",{"parent":doc.name},"setting_type")
